title: Friction Log Entry
description: One line of ~/.claude/plugins/data/vibe-cartographer/friction.jsonl. Append-only via scripts/atomic-append-jsonl.js. Defensive default — when in doubt, don't log.

timestamp.description: ISO datetime when the friction was observed.

plugin_version.description: Vibe Cartographer version that emitted the entry. Read from .claude-plugin/plugin.json at log time.

command.description: Slash command that triggered the friction (e.g. 'scope', 'build').

project_dir.description: Basename of the project working directory. Used for filtering and orphan correlation.

project_id.description: Optional 626 Labs Dashboard project ID, when bound.

sessionUUID.description: UUID v4 issued by session-logger.start(). Ties friction entries back to the originating session-log sentinel + terminal pair.

friction_type.description: One of the seven canonical friction types. Source of truth for trigger mapping is skills/guide/references/friction-triggers.md.

confidence.description: Logger's confidence the signal is real. /evolve weights base = high:1.0, medium:0.6, low:0.3.

symptom.description: Free-text description of the observable behavior (e.g. "User chose 'skip cuts' when default was 'walk through cuts'").

agent_guess_at_cause.description: Optional hypothesis from the agent. Useful for /evolve grouping but never authoritative.

complement_involved.description: Name of the Pattern #13 complement involved when friction_type is complement_rejected, else null.
